title: FFR, Fast Frequency Reserve, Purchased DK2 (Discontinued, please read description) (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] This dataset is no longer updated. It is replaced by the dataset [FFR, Fast Frequency Reserve, DK2](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/ffrdk2).

Amount and prices of Fast Frequency Reserve (FFR) automatic upward regulation in price area DK2.
Energinet purchases FFR per hour through daily auctions in a national market.

The need is published in this dataset [FFR, Fast Frequency Reserve, demand DK2](https://www.energidataservice.dk/tso-electricity/ffrdemanddk2).

The forecast per hour for the next operating day (d + 1) is the quantity purchased in the auction for the coming operating day.

Suppliers who wants to bid for FFR capacity must have approved the technical properties of the facilities before bidding: Prequalification and test.
 
For further information, please see:
* [Balancering og systemydelser](https://energinet.dk/el/balancering-og-systemydelser/)
* [Balancing and Ancillary Services](https://en.energinet.dk/electricity/balancing-and-ancillary-services/)
